_comment:
SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for the storybook's page universe. The scanner (usage-scan.py), the editing server (server.py) and the storybook (storybook.html) all read this.
status — the page's lifecycle, and it decides what the system does with it:
  live     = finished and in use. Scanned, counted, audited, and edited when you Accept an opportunity.
  draft    = still being made. Scanned and counted (so a component it uses is never reported 'unused') and edited when you Accept (so it can't rot while you finish it) — but it isn't nagged about.
  archived = done with. Not scanned, not counted, not audited, never edited. It costs the system nothing.
group = where a page appears (Pages / Organisms / Flows). scrollText (optional) = scroll the preview to matching text.

pages.name: Talents
pages.desc: The earlier Talents page — kept for comparison against Talents (v2).

pages.name: Resources
pages.desc: The career blog index — hero + the shared .ev-* listing (topic filters, search, pagination) + the dark CTA closer. Zero page CSS.

pages.name: Virtual job fair
pages.desc: Event detail — the virtual job fair. Shares .ev-hero with Summit and Chat & Learn.

pages.name: Summit
pages.desc: Event detail — the summit. Sibling of Virtual job fair and Chat & Learn.

pages.name: Chat & Learn
pages.desc: Event detail — Chat & Learn. Sibling of Virtual job fair and Summit.

pages.name: Unified nav — Option 2
pages.desc: The unified top nav — Option 2, with the logged-in view right below. Live from nav-options.html. Hover items; shrink the width to see the mobile drawer.

pages.desc: The canonical nav + top-alert bar, in every state.

pages.name: Chat & Learn signup
pages.desc: The common / for-all event signup — 'Building on AI: a Chat & Learn'. The latest flow, live.

pages.name: Sign in
pages.desc: Sign in, with the identity-chips step.
